discovery_cards.title: PYT Shows
discovery_cards.body: Full-scale Main Stage productions, performed at Mountain View's premier venue; focused small cast Studio Shows, performed at our studio on Old Middlefield Way.

discovery_cards.eyebrow: For young performers, schools, families & readers
discovery_cards.title: Stories on Stage
discovery_cards.body: Beloved children's books brought to life in short, lively performances. Actors are cast in a small company each year.

discovery_cards.title: Classes & Camps
discovery_cards.body: After-school drama and musical theatre, holiday camps, masterclasses.

discovery_cards.title: Costume & Prop Rentals
discovery_cards.body: Decades of theatrical inventory available to schools and community theatre at affordable rates.

discovery_cards.title: Support PYT
discovery_cards.body: Donations, show sponsorships, seasons sponsorships, donations-in-kind, stock, all of it helps PYT reach as many families and youth as possible.

stats.label: Years serving youth and community across the peninsula

hero_lede: PYT is the Bay Area's home for community youth theatre. From first auditions to opening nights, we believe in the magic that happens when a young person steps on stage!
